metadata.goal: Migrate K8s deployment from database-per-tenant (3 DBs: grexc, grext1, grext2) to schema-per-tenant (1 DB: rayuela, with public + tenant_{uuid} schemas) to match the current application architecture.

features.description: Fix DB connection: align K8s env vars with what the Spring Boot app expects (DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USERNAME, DB_PASSWORD) so the app connects to rayuela-db instead of falling back to localhost.
acceptance: base/app/configmap.yaml uses DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USERNAME instead of CENTRAL_DB_* and TENANT_T*_* vars
base/app/deployment.yaml uses DB_PASSWORD instead of CENTRAL_DB_PASSWORD for both init container and main container
base/app/deployment.yaml no longer references TENANT_T1_DB_PASSWORD or TENANT_T2_DB_PASSWORD
base/database/statefulset.yaml sets POSTGRES_DB to 'rayuela' instead of 'postgres'
base/database/statefulset.yaml health probes check against 'rayuela' database
env/prod/patches/configmap.yaml does not reference any CENTRAL_DB_* or TENANT_T*_* vars

features.description: Rewrite init-db.sh for single-database schema-per-tenant: create tenant schemas (not separate databases), grant CREATE ON DATABASE, set schema privileges. Prod creates 1 tenant schema, dev creates 2.
acceptance: base/app/init-db.sh creates tenant schemas (tenant_{uuid}) inside the 'rayuela' database instead of creating separate databases (grexc, grext1, grext2)
init-db.sh grants CREATE ON DATABASE rayuela to the app user so new tenant schemas can be created at runtime
init-db.sh grants ALL PRIVILEGES on public schema and tenant schemas to the app user
init-db.sh reads tenant UUIDs from env var DB_HOST connection (connects to 'rayuela' DB)
Prod creates schema tenant_f780d30d-20a4-4d0a-a2f7-b3a1523eb3d6 (Obispado de Cruz del Eje)
Dev creates schemas tenant_f780d30d-20a4-4d0a-a2f7-b3a1523eb3d6 and tenant_df766dc2-6d4c-44d4-90ad-19d9ab69fa9d
Tenant schema list is hardcoded per-environment via Kustomize patches (Option A)

features.description: Adapt all SQL seed files for schema-per-tenant model: add SET search_path directives, fix column names (schema_name not nombre_esquema, status not estado), fix enum values (HABILITADO not ENABLED for tenant_users), add schema_name to organizations INSERT.
acceptance: All public-schema SQL files (central-data, convenios-data, cargos-data, conceptos-data, concepto-versiones-data) start with SET search_path = 'public';
Prod tenant1-data.sql starts with SET search_path = 'tenant_f780d30d-20a4-4d0a-a2f7-b3a1523eb3d6';
Dev tenant1-data.sql starts with SET search_path = 'tenant_f780d30d-20a4-4d0a-a2f7-b3a1523eb3d6';
Dev tenant2-data.sql starts with SET search_path = 'tenant_df766dc2-6d4c-44d4-90ad-19d9ab69fa9d';
organizations INSERT includes schema_name column with value 'tenant_{uuid}'
organizations INSERT uses status = 'ACTIVA' (not 'ACTIVE')
tenant_users INSERT uses status = 'HABILITADO' (not 'ENABLED')
All SQL file comments updated to remove references to grexc/grext1/grext2 databases
All SQL files remain idempotent (ON CONFLICT)

features.description: Update seed scripts to use single 'rayuela' database: all psql commands use -d rayuela, catalog data (convenios, cargos, conceptos) runs once against public schema instead of duplicated per-tenant DB, remove migration SQL calls (already merged into seed files).
acceptance: scripts/seed-prod.sh uses '-d rayuela' for all psql commands instead of -d grexc/-d grext1/-d grext2
scripts/seed-prod.sh runs catalog data (convenios, cargos, conceptos, concepto-versiones) only once (not duplicated per tenant)
scripts/seed-prod.sh no longer calls migration SQL files (001-*, 002-*) since data is in main seed files
scripts/seed-dev.sh uses '-d rayuela' for all psql commands
scripts/seed-dev.sh runs catalog data only once
Both scripts have clear comments explaining the public vs tenant schema data flow

features.description: Update prod backup script to dump single 'rayuela' database instead of three separate databases (grexc, grext1, grext2).
acceptance: env/prod/backup/backup.sh sets DATABASES='rayuela' instead of 'grexc grext1 grext2'
Backup comments updated to reflect single-database architecture

features.description: Remove obsolete migration SQL files and clean up Kustomize configMapGenerator. Migration 001 (Stella Maris BU) and 002 (convenio escala salarial) data is already in the main seed files.
acceptance: env/prod/sql/migrations/001-add-stella-maris-bu.sql removed
env/prod/sql/migrations/002-add-convenio-escala-salarial.sql removed
env/prod/sql/migrations/ directory removed
env/prod/kustomization.yaml configMapGenerator no longer references migration SQL files
base/kustomization.yaml comment updated (remove 'prod=rayuela' namespace reference on line 8)

features.description: Update README.md to reflect single-database schema-per-tenant architecture: fix env var documentation, update DB initialization section, remove grexc/grext1/grext2 references, update seed data instructions.
acceptance: README no longer references grexc, grext1, grext2 databases
README documents DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USERNAME, DB_PASSWORD env vars
README explains schema-per-tenant architecture (public + tenant_{uuid} schemas)
README seed data section shows correct scripts/seed-prod.sh usage
README DB initialization section accurately describes the init container behavior (creates tenant schemas, not databases)
